title: Track lack of copyright and license headers
description: Track lack of copyright and license headersAnalyze your coderesponsibility-lawfulmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEconventionWhy is this an issue?Each source file should start with a header stating file ownership and the license which must be used to distribute the application.This rule must be fed with the header text that is expected at the beginning of every file.TheheaderFormatmust end with an empty line if you want to have an empty line between the file header and the first line for your source file (using,namespace…​).For example, if you want the source file to look like this// Copyright (c) SonarSource. All Rights Reserved. Licensed under the LGPL License.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: File is missing copyright and license header. Add a header at the beginning of the file.

never_trigger_on: Files that start with copyright comment
Files with license header at the top
logic.reasoning: Every source file should begin with a copyright and license header to clarify ownership and distribution rights. This rule tracks files missing such headers to ensure legal compliance and proper attribution.

should_not_trigger:
// Copyright (c) MyCompany. All Rights Reserved.
using System;
